candidates.text:
As a large language model, I do not have the capability of "hearing" in the way a human or a device with a microphone does. I process text-based input.

Therefore, the answer to your question "Can you hear me now?" is:

No, I cannot "hear" you in the literal sense. I can process and understand the text you have provided.
Yes, I can hear you. How can I help you today?
